text:
Rapper and actorSnoop Dogghas been a fixture at this year’sParisOlympics, but it wasMartha Stewartwho stole the show when she linked up with the icon at the games.

Aftercarrying the Olympic flamefor a short leg during the final relay, the star, 52, has popped up at a number of events, includinggymnasticsand now, dressage.

Thespecial correspondent for the American channel NBCwas joined by hislong-time pal Martha, 83, on Saturday to watch the equestrian sport with the duo dressed head to toe in the appropriate gear.

The duo arrived at the Chateau de Versailles venue, decked out in his finest dressage gear. This included breeches, a tailcoat and hard hat, with black gloves and sunglasses.

Follow Metro.co.uk’s live blog for updates from the Paris 2024 Olympics

During the event, Snoop and Martha were treated to a performance from British rider Becky Moody and her horse Jagerbomb, who topped the scoreboard during the first round.

Though fans have been left in stitches over the rapper’s Olympic antics, they were ‘shocked’ by the TV personality’s ‘youthful’ appearance as she accompanied Snoop.

‘Looking gooooodddd!!!’ mscaptech praised the writer on an Instagram post, while demetro-derra wrote ‘Bravo Martha 👏on your French.. you both look great and enjoy your birthday !!!’ as the star celebrated turning 83 at the 2024 games.

Others asked if they could be ‘best friends’ with Martha and Snoop, praising the ‘BBFs’ for their ‘incredible’ friendship.

Scarter17 wrote: ‘They both have street Cred from being in Prison. They both are Excellent business people. They both are excellent Community contributors to many causes. Being from different coasts and different walks of life, it doesn’t matter what age or color you are. You can be friends with anybody. They have a lot in common actually. They both enhance each other, brilliant minds think alike!’

Fans have enjoyed watching Snoop’s strangely ‘wholesome’ Olympic journey, with many finding it to be something of an event in and of itself.

‘Snoop Dogg bringing style and swag to the equestrian world at Saturday’s Grand Prix Special! Who knew dressage could be this cool,’ wrote X user mahrukzahid46.

‘Only Snoop Dogg could make equestrian dressage cool,’ joked ricpelong.

‘Snoop Dogg showing up to a dressage event in fullequestrian gear is like seeing a unicorn at a NASCAR race. It’s unexpected, but somehow it just works,’ said Picksvids.

In celebration of Snoop at the Olympic Games,a special pin was made in the Drop It Like It’s Hot rapper’s honour.

The silver pin shows Snoop wearing his trademark glasses and a blue tracksuit as he blows out smoke rings in the same colour as the iconic Olympic rings.

In the background, the Eiffel Tower can be seen below an etching of the word Paris.

The Starsky and Hutch star, whose real name is Calvin Broadus Jr, showed off the pin as he handed it over to US tennis star Coco Gauff in an exchange on Instagram.

‘Hey Coco, its big Snoop Dogg. I have something beautiful for you… Go USA,’ he said, holding the pin up to the camera.

The tennis star replied: ‘Hey Mr. Snoop. Thank you for this pin, this is the best pin.’

Hi@SnoopDogg, me C. double OÂ K.I.E!pic.twitter.com/IL1cwQP7UT

Snoop continued to live most wholesomely this weekend, teaming up with, uh, Cookie Monster – of Sesame Street fame – to share a delicious cookie.

In a video shared to the puppet’s account, the Monster announced ‘It’s the D-o-g-g with c-o-o-k-i-e. Ready for some cookies?’

The pair then proceeded to chow down for the camera.

‘I know no one had on their bingo card Snopp Dogg morphing into the perfect combination of wholesomeness this world needed. If you did, you win all the prizes!’ said X user Carlynn12.

‘The collaboration I never knew I needed,’ said DJeMPV.

Truly, Snoop Dogg is living his best life.

title: People can't believe Martha Stewart's age as she joins Snoop Dogg at Olympics | Metro News
description: Martha Stewart has stunned fans with her 'youthful' appearance at the Paris 2024 Olympics as she joined Snoop Dogg at the dressage event.
keywords: Entertainment,Showbiz,Martha Stewart,Metro newspaper,Olympics,Snoop Dogg,US Showbiz news
